# Memory & resource budgets (auto-generated from test-harness)

_Regenerate with: make integration-appendix (or run specific meta tests)._

See tests/test-harness/tests/meta/budget_breakdown.rs and footprint_test.rs.

  cargo test -p test-harness --test meta budget_breakdown -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -100
